summary: Implemented ADR 0236 from the isolated latest-origin/main worktree by adopting TanStack Query in the Windmill operator admin raw app, staging frontend dependencies before raw-app sync, hardening transient OpenBao reads during converge, and replaying the full private Windmill live apply plus runtime verification.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest -q tests/test_openbao_compose_env_helper.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py` returned `10 passed in 5.69s`, the temporary raw-app TypeScript replay with `npm install --include=dev --no-package-lock` and `npx tsc --noEmit` succeeded, `make syntax-check-windmill` passed, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` passed from the latest-origin/main worktree.

verification.check: Latest-origin/main Windmill converge with raw-app dependency staging and OpenBao retries
verification.observed: `BOOTSTRAP_KEY=/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 make converge-windmill` completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/platform_server/.worktrees/ws-0236-live-apply` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=226 changed=30 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=63 changed=1 failed=0`, and `proxmox-host ok=36 changed=4 failed=0`.

Authenticated Windmill API replay reported app path `f/lv3/operator_access_admin`, live version `20`, edit timestamp `2026-03-28T22:50:09.339380Z`, and `raw_app: true`. The deployed raw app payload confirmed dependency `@tanstack/react-query: ^5.85.1`, `QueryClientProvider`, `useQuery`, `useMutation`, `refetchInterval: 60_000`, and `refetchInterval: selectedOperatorId ? 45_000 : false`.
A `run_wait_result` replay of `f/lv3/operator_roster` returned `{status: "ok", operator_count: 1, active_count: 1, inactive_count: 0}` after the converge.
A direct GET of `http://100.64.0.1:8005/apps/get/p/f/lv3/operator_access_admin` returned HTTP `200` and the response body contained the Windmill app shell.

notes: This branch-local receipt captures the first verified latest-origin/main replay for ADR 0236; protected release surfaces and ADR metadata still require the final mainline integration step.

The final branch-side `pre-push-gate` replay passed after the ownership and generated-diagram fixes except for the expected protected-file drift on `build/platform-manifest.json`, which must be refreshed during the final `main` integration step.

The Windmill runtime now installs frontend dependencies inside the staged raw-app sync directory and removes stale staged `package-lock.json` files before `wmill sync push`, which keeps repo-managed raw apps compatible with newly introduced browser dependencies.
The shared OpenBao compose-env helper now retries current secret and policy reads before drift comparison so healthy but briefly busy or unsealing automation listeners do not fail the full converge.
